LAW AND MOTION, 302 PLAINTIFF CHARIFA ABID'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT GRANTED. JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED IN PLAINTIFF'S FAVOR UNDER PREMIUM COMMERCIAL. PLAINTIFF HAS LEAVE OF COURT TO SEEK FEES AND COSTS BY FORMAL MOTION. COURT EXCLUDES REQUEST FOR CIVIL PENALTIES FROM JUDGMENT. ORDER & JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
